title: An Angelic World
wikitext:
[]: An Angelic World             Quote Post by Otakon 08 Ikari » Thu Nov 05, 2009 10:49 pm Try to imagine that world, a world where Lilim do not exist and the children of Adam populate the world they had before we came. I simply do not know what that world would look like since I'm sure each Angel has its own view of the world if they are even able to do that. What I made above is my idea of what an Angel might see their world as. There are no signs of Lilim kind anyway, just a snowy cold day. Would it be anything like this, would it be completely different. Lets try to figure that out.

[]:             Quote Post by slothen » Fri Nov 06, 2009 1:52 am Your world looked kind of empty so I upgraded it for you.

[]:             Quote Post by Fazmotron » Fri Nov 06, 2009 1:54 am Heres your Angelica world:

[]:             Quote Post by Otakon 08 Ikari » Fri Nov 06, 2009 2:16 am nevermind, tried to have a good discussion but it seems to hard for you.

[]:             Quote Post by slothen » Fri Nov 06, 2009 8:48 am okay sorry so what's your topic here? I couldn't tell if it was to imagine what a angel environment/ecosystem/planet would look like, or if it was about how angels physically perceive the world with and the functioning of their sense organs. The former question has been done I'm sure, and the later is so completely far out in fantasy land I didn't really know what to think. All I had was the picture. And as I said... Your world looked kind of empty so I upgraded it for you.

[]:             Quote Post by Otakon 08 Ikari » Fri Nov 06, 2009 10:15 am The first question, lets go with that. What their world might look like.

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Fri Nov 06, 2009 2:33 pm A bunch of Angels flying around, doing Angel things. There probably wouldn't even be so much as grass and bacteria, since those are products of Lilith. So you have Angels living on a more or less dead rock.

[]:             Quote Post by Otakon 08 Ikari » Fri Nov 06, 2009 4:08 pm AuraTwilight wrote: A bunch of Angels flying around, doing Angel things. There probably wouldn't even be so much as grass and bacteria, since those are products of Lilith. So you have Angels living on a more or less dead rock.

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Fri Nov 06, 2009 4:25 pm Here is your Angelic World! But in all seriousness: I'm sure an angelic based world would pretty much be like a human based world. Except you'll see a lot more angels like Sachiel, Sammiel, Zuruel, etc. running around and doing stuff humans do.

[]:             Quote Post by Hedphelym » Fri Nov 06, 2009 4:26 pm I never really thought of an Angelic world being that boring. Hey, there's a possibility that there could be Angelic vegetation. Maybe a large forest of trees/shrub-esque growth that are actually one huge, mostly stationary Angel?

[]:             Quote Post by ObsessiveMathsFreak » Fri Nov 06, 2009 4:40 pm Depends on what kind of Angels you are talking about. ADO lifeforms would probably have made a world akin to that seen in Antarctica in #12. LDO lifeforms would have made a world, well, like Earth. that seemed to suit them before after all.

[]:             Quote Post by slothen » Fri Nov 06, 2009 6:00 pm dem acronyms

[]:             Quote Post by ObsessiveMathsFreak » Fri Nov 06, 2009 6:07 pm I believe it goes: ADO - Adam derived organism (Angels/Kaworu) LDO - Lilith derived organism (regular organisims/Humans/Rei/(Kaworu?)) Strangely, we don't seem to have an entry in the geektionary for this....

[]:             Quote Post by Holy Diver » Fri Nov 06, 2009 6:59 pm I imagine an angelic world to be like some desolate, frigid rock filled with Lovecraftian beings acting much like animals in the wild. They fight amongst each other for sustainance, and they breed with each other to create even more bizzare hybrid creatures. To a LDO, It would be fasinating and only somewhat frightening at first, but would quickly become absolutly horrific. For the angels start to mindfuck you until you are slowly driven to insanity.

[]:             Quote Post by Otakon 08 Ikari » Fri Nov 06, 2009 9:10 pm They would not fight over food nor would they mate for they have no reason to since they have S2 organs. If Lilith never came to Earth and Adam awoke, would 'she' even give 'birth' to her children as in would there even be more Angels or just Adam with a planet to herself? The Angels were born on Second Impact, no SI then no more Angels.

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Sat Nov 07, 2009 2:11 am Adam's purpose is to give birth to the Angels. They only reason why she took so long as because Lilith's presence put Adam into suspended animation. The Second Impact was an attempt to destroy all of Lilith's children.

[]:             Quote Post by Otakon 08 Ikari » Sat Nov 07, 2009 10:29 am Alright, that explains that but still I wonder what a world for 17 creatures would look like.

[]:             Quote Post by ObsessiveMathsFreak » Sat Nov 07, 2009 11:37 am Otakon 08 Ikari wrote: Alright, that explains that but still I wonder what a world for 17 creatures would look like.

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Sat Nov 07, 2009 3:33 pm Otakon 08 Ikari wrote: Alright, that explains that but still I wonder what a world for 17 creatures would look like.

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Sat Nov 07, 2009 5:14 pm Well actually only fourteen were created by Adam; Kaworu was likely created in a similar manner as Rei. But yes, I agree that had Adam not been interrupted, several more Angels would have been born.
summary: []: An Angelic World             Quote Post by Otakon 08 Ikari » Thu Nov 05, 2009 10:49 pm Try to imagine that world, a world where Lilim do not exist and the children of Adam populate the world they had before we came. I simply do not know what that world would look like since I'm sure each Angel has its own view of the world if they are even able to do that. What I made above is my idea of what an Angel might see their world as. There
